THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ORDERED THAT PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11581, AND PURSUANT TO THIS COURT'S STATEMENT OF DECISION, PLAINTIFFS HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT JAMAL FESAI DAVID EID, DEFENDNANT YOUSFA EID, DEFENDANT RONNIE EID, DEFENDANT ROCKY EID, AND DEFENDANT REYAD EDAIS IN THE AMOUNT OF $25,000.00 EACH AS A CIVIL PENALTY.
